'''hamaja''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:sibirskite|sibirskite]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-m-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:sibirskite|sibirskite]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| hamaja
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:hæmæjæth|hæmæjæth]] || [[word:hæmæjæj|hæmæjæj]] || [[word:hæmæjæsh|hæmæjæsh]] || [[word:hæmæjæ|hæmæjæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:hamamajath|hamamajath]] || [[word:hamamajaj|hamamajaj]] || [[word:hamamajash|hamamajash]] || [[word:hamamaja|hamamaja]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:hamajath|hamajath]] || [[word:hamajaj|hamajaj]] || [[word:hamajash|hamajash]] || [[word:hamaja|hamaja]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:hamafjafth|hamafjafth]] || [[word:hamafjafj|hamafjafj]] || [[word:hamafjafsh|hamafjafsh]] || [[word:hamafjaf|hamafjaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:hamajatha|hamajatha]] || [[word:hamajaja|hamajaja]] || [[word:hamajasha|hamajasha]] || [[word:hamajaka|hamajaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:hamajath|hamajath]] || [[word:hamajaj|hamajaj]] || [[word:hamajash|hamajash]] || [[word:hamaja|hamaja]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:hamajathal|hamajathal]] || [[word:hamajajal|hamajajal]] || [[word:hamajashal|hamajashal]] || [[word:hamajakal|hamajakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:hamajaathatha|hamajaathatha]] || [[word:hamajaajaja|hamajaajaja]] || [[word:hamajaashasha|hamajaashasha]] || [[word:hamajaaka|hamajaaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:hamajathan|hamajathan]] || [[word:hamajajan|hamajajan]] || [[word:hamajashan|hamajashan]] || [[word:hamajakan|hamajakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:hamajathaoro|hamajathaoro]] || [[word:hamajajaoro|hamajajaoro]] || [[word:hamajashaoro|hamajashaoro]] || [[word:hamajakaoro|hamajakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|a3ddb2a}}
